test_cases.name: ci_failure_analysis
test_cases.text: Our CI pipeline fails 10 times a day due to flaky tests. As a DevOps engineer, I have to open the logs, find the traceback, and figure out if it's a real bug or just flake. It takes 15 mins every time. I want a tool that just tells me 'this is a flake, ignore it'.
test_cases.expected_problem: manually analyzing flaky CI test failures
